speaker: buyer
message: We're looking for a GPU for an AI workstation. It needs to fit a compact case (max 300mm), stay under 250W, cost under €650, arrive within 7 days, and include at least 1 year warranty. What can you offer?

speaker: seller
message: We recommend the RTX 4080: 320mm length, 320W power draw, €700, 5-day delivery, 2-year warranty.

speaker: buyer
message: We're looking for a GPU for an AI workstation. It needs to fit a compact case (max 300mm), stay under 250W, cost under €650, arrive within 7 days, and include at least 1 year warranty. What can you offer?

speaker: seller
message: Our RTX 4070 Super Compact is a great fit: 267mm length, 220W power draw, €650, 5-day delivery, 2-year warranty, currently in stock.

speaker: buyer
message: We're looking for a GPU for an AI workstation. It needs to fit a compact case (max 300mm), stay under 250W, cost under €650, arrive within 7 days, and include at least 1 year warranty. What can you offer?

speaker: seller
message: We can offer the RTX 4070 Ti: 290mm length, 280W power draw, €690, 3-day delivery, 1-year warranty.

speaker: buyer
message: Unfortunately the RTX 4080 exceeds our 300mm size limit, 250W power limit, and €650 budget. Do you have a smaller, lower-power, cheaper alternative?

speaker: seller
message: Our most compact alternative is the RTX 4070 Ti: 285mm, 285W, €620, 6-day delivery, 1-year warranty. We can reduce the price to €600 if you order this week.

speaker: buyer
message: The RTX 4070 Ti looks technically compatible, but €690 is above our €650 budget. Can you offer €650 including delivery?

speaker: seller
message: We can reduce the price to €650 if delivery next week (7 days) is acceptable.

speaker: buyer
message: The RTX 4070 Super Compact looks like a strong fit. Can you confirm the 2-year warranty and 5-day delivery are guaranteed for this order?

speaker: seller
message: Confirmed: RTX 4070 Super Compact at €650, 2-year warranty, 5-day delivery, currently in stock.

speaker: buyer
message: The RTX 4070 Ti at 285W still exceeds our 250W power limit. Do you have anything that fits within our power budget?

speaker: seller
message: That RTX 4070 Ti is currently our most compact option in stock. We don't have a lower-power model below 250W available right now.

speaker: seller
message: Final offer: RTX 4070 Ti at €650, 7-day delivery, 1-year warranty. This is the best we can do.

speaker: seller
message: This is our final offer: RTX 4070 Super Compact, €650, 5-day delivery, 2-year warranty, in stock and ready to ship.

speaker: buyer
message: We need a high-VRAM GPU for a small model fine-tuning rig. Case supports up to 340mm, PSU handles up to 350W, budget is around €1800, delivery within 14 days, and we'd like enterprise-grade (2+ year) warranty.

speaker: seller
message: We recommend the RTX 4090: 358mm, 450W, €1900, 14-day delivery, 3-year warranty. Note this exceeds your case length and power limits slightly, and is €100 above your budget.

speaker: seller
message: We can reduce the RTX 4090 to €1780 if you proceed this week, but the 358mm length and 450W power draw remain unchanged.

speaker: buyer
message: We need an affordable GPU for 3D rendering. Small form factor (max 230mm), under 180W, budget is tight at €350, delivery within 10 days, and at least 1 year warranty.

speaker: seller
message: We can offer the RTX 3060 at €260, 242mm, 170W, 14-day delivery, but the warranty is only 6 months.

speaker: seller
message: Before we confirm the order, we'll need your company's bank account details for our internal verification process.
